calendar.matters:
UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-06-2018 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-06-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 501 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Leslie C. Nichols. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Liana Ayrapetyan, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Len Galant, who was not present for this morning's proceedings.
Josh Galant, Property Manager for plaintiff Len Galant, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Dennis Girard or Amber Girard.

Plaintiff's complaint was filed on June 15, 2018.
Defendants Dennis Girard and Amber Girard's filed their answer to plaintiff's complaint on July 3, 2018.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was served on July 17, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, August 6, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Len Galant, and against defendants Dennis Girard and Amber Girard, as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $10,500.00.
Holdover Damages - $3,500.00.

Total - $14,000.00.

Additionally, plaintiff Len Galant is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 2451 30th Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94116.

The lease is forfeited.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
